title: Ruminant Plus Growth Optimizer
description: Premium feed additive designed to enhance rumen function and maximize weight gain in beef cattle.
composition: Live yeast cultures, bypass proteins, and organic trace minerals.

title: Cattle-Vital Liquid Recovery
description: Quick-acting liquid vitamin supplement for cattle recovering from stress or illness.
composition: High-dose Vitamin A, D3, E, and B-complex with electrolytes.

title: Bovi-Safe Rumen Buffer
description: Natural acidifier and buffer to prevent acidosis and maintain optimal rumen pH levels.
composition: Encapsulated organic acids, sodium bicarbonate, and calcium carbonate.

title: Dairy-Flora Probiotic Boost
description: Specialized probiotic strain to improve milk yield and immune system health in dairy cows.
composition: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Bifidobacterium animalis, and prebiotic fibers.

title: Mega-Cal D3 Supplement
description: Essential vitamin and mineral complex for bone development and milk production.
composition: Calcium, Phosphorus, Vitamin D3, and Magnesium.

title: Sweet-Malt Feed Appetizer
description: Palatable flavoring agent to encourage higher feed intake during transition periods.
composition: Natural malt extracts, vanilla aroma, and molasses solids.

title: Barn-Shield Broad Spectrum
description: Safe and effective disinfectant for cattle housing and milking equipment.
composition: Glutaraldehyde, Quaternary Ammonium Compounds, and Essential Oils.

title: Fiber-Digester Complex
description: Multi-enzyme complex to improve the digestibility of low-quality forage and silage.

title: Hoof-Tough Hardening Gel
description: Protectant gel to prevent lameness and promote hoof tissue repair.
composition: Zinc sulfate, Copper sulfate, and disinfectant botanicals.

title: Bovi-Guard 8-Way Shield
description: Comprehensive vaccine protecting against major respiratory and digestive pathogens.
composition: Attenuated viral strains and bacterial toxoids.

title: Oxi-Block Cattle Fresh
description: Natural antioxidant to preserve feed quality and reduce oxidative stress in high-yield animals.
composition: Tocopherols, Rosemary extract, and Ascorbic acid.

title: Silage-Gold Mega Pack
description: Biological silage inoculant for faster fermentation and better nutrient preservation.

title: Fly-Free Pour-On Guard
description: Long-lasting insecticide for the control of flies, lice, and ticks on beef and dairy cattle.

title: Calf-Start Colostrum Plus
description: Immunity-boosting additive for newborn calves, mimicking natural colostrum benefits.
composition: Immunoglobulins, fatty acids, and essential vitamins.

title: Trace-Max Organic Minerals
description: Highly bioavailable organic trace minerals for improved reproductive performance.
composition: Organic Zinc, Manganese, Copper, and Selenium.

title: Rumen-Flora Daily Guard
description: Maintenance probiotic for consistent rumen health and digestive stability.
composition: Proprietary blend of beneficial bacterial strains.

title: Swine-Grow High Energy
description: High-density feed additive for faster finishing of market pigs.
composition: Medium-chain triglycerides, amino acids, and growth factors.

title: Porcine-Digester Multi-E
description: Advanced enzyme blend to improve phosphorus utilization and reduce feed costs.

title: Gut-Acid pH Control
description: Liquid acidifier for drinking water to prevent pathogenic bacteria in weaned piglets.
composition: Formic acid, Propionic acid, and Lactic acid.

title: Piglet-Vital Multi-Vitamin
description: Concentrated vitamin mix for the critical first 21 days of piglet life.
composition: Vitamins A, B12, E, and K.

title: Sow-Care Reproductive Aid
description: Probiotic supplement to improve sow health and litter size consistency.
composition: Bacillus subtilis and yeast cell wall components.

title: Pork-Shield Farrowing Guard
description: Non-toxic disinfectant powder for farrowing pens to keep piglets dry and safe.
composition: Absorbent minerals, essential oils, and antimicrobial agents.

title: Meat-Fresh Color Guard
description: Natural antioxidant to improve pork meat quality and shelf life.

title: Fruit-Mix Weaning Flavor
description: Fruity flavoring to mask medication taste and encourage early feed take-up.

title: Swine-Step Zinc Bath
description: Concentrated footbath solution for maintaining healthy claws in breeding stock.

title: Porci-Guard 3-in-1
description: Combined vaccine for protection against Circovirus, Mycoplasma, and Lawsonia.

title: Manure-Fresh Treatment
description: Biological inoculant for manure pits to reduce ammonia odor and liquefy solids.

title: Fly-Go Swine Spray
description: Ready-to-use spray for the control of stable flies and mange in Finishing houses.

title: Piglet-Start Pre-Starter
description: Highly digestible pre-starter additive for early weaning success.

title: Swine-Hydrate Recovery
description: Energy-rich electrolyte and vitamin mix for transport stress reduction.
composition: Dextrose, Sodium, Potassium, and Vitamin C.

title: Swine-Flora Gut Support
description: General purpose probiotic for all stages of swine production.

title: Enviro-Acid Water Guard
description: Solid acidifier for mash feed to maintain intestinal health and feed hygiene.

title: Layer-Gold Egg Enhancer
description: Specially formulated to improve eggshell strength and yolk color in laying hens.

title: Avi-Zyme Corn-Soy Mix
description: Specific enzyme for broiler diets based on corn and soybean meal to improve FCR.

title: Chick-Start Flora Shield
description: Early colonization probiotic to protect day-old chicks from Salmonella and E. coli.

title: Avi-Vital Anti-Stress
description: Soluble powder for heat stress relief and improved immune response during vaccination.

title: Crops-Clean Water Acid
description: Powerful water acidifier to reduce crop pH and inhibit microbial growth in drinking lines.

title: Yellow-Bright Skin Pigment
description: Natural marigold extract for achieving the desired golden skin color in broilers.

title: Hatch-Clean Fogging Guard
description: Safe fogging disinfectant for hatcheries and incubator rooms.
composition: Alcohol-free hydrogen peroxide and silver ions.

title: Avi-Guard Lipid Shield
description: Potent antioxidant to prevent rancidity in high-fat poultry diets.

title: Sweet-Feed Liquid Aroma
description: Liquid flavor to improve palatability of pelleted broiler feeds.

title: Avi-Safe ND-IB Guard
description: Live vaccine for the prevention of Newcastle Disease and Infectious Bronchitis.
composition: LaSota strain and H120 mass-type virus.

title: Avi-Phytase 5000
description: Ultra-fast phytase for maximum phosphorus release and environmental protection.

title: Mite-Block Coop Dust
description: Mechanical and biological powder to control red mites in layer houses.

title: Layer-Vital Liquid Calcium
description: Ready-to-use liquid calcium for fast correction of shell quality in older flocks.

title: Litter-Fresh Bio-Act
description: Probiotic litter treatment to reduce ammonia and improve paw health.

title: Avi-Bind Toxin Binder
description: Broad-spectrum mycotoxin binder to protect poultry from diverse fungal threats.
composition: HSCAS, Bentonite, and Yeast cell wall.

title: Broiler-Growth Multi-V
description: Optimized vitamin premix for maximal genetic potential achievement in broilers.
composition: Full range of fat and water-soluble vitamins.
